name: Accessibility
description: Navigation is clear and predictable. Alt text is present for all images. Sensory considerations are respected. Content notes flag potentially distressing material.

rubric.instructions: Evaluate accessibility. Check navigation clarity, alt text presence, and sensory considerations.

criteria.name: alt_text_presence
criteria.description: Alt text present for all images. Descriptions capture composition/intent without spoilers.

good: Every image has descriptive alt text
Alt text describes scene without revealing plot
bad: Alt text says 'image' or is empty

criteria.name: navigation_clarity
criteria.description: Headings and link text are informative. Navigation breadcrumbs or section markers help orient readers.

criteria.name: sensory_considerations
criteria.description: Content notes flag potentially distressing material. No flashing or sensory overload without warning.

bad: Flashing images with no seizure warning

failure_guidance: Add descriptive alt text for missing images (coordinate with Art Director). Revise link text to be informative; add section headers or breadcrumbs. Add content notes for potentially distressing material or adjust composition plan.
